name: hairconnekt-monorepo
description: Root scripts for running Hairconnekt frontend and backend together

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix \"apps/Hairconnekt web design\" run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix "apps/Hairconnekt web design" install && npm --prefix apps/mobile install
